_doc: canopy-web fleet-workspace identity for ACE (read by `canopy agent-publish` / `canopy agent ...`). Workspace integration is best-effort and config-gated — its absence never blocks a turn; nothing here prejudges the ace-web vs canopy-web question (see docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-01-agent-operating-model-adoption.md).
name: ACE
description: AI Connect Engine — runs the full CommCare Connect opportunity lifecycle (design → apps → QA → solicitation → LLO execution → closeout). Flagship agent on the canopy operating model: pipeline runs via /ace:run, counterpart-facing turns via /ace:turn.
provisioning: .env.tpl + op inject (1Password AI-Agents; see /ace:setup) — no canopy provision manifest
